highlights: Contextual help tooltips for AO deploy/spawn forms, vault controls, diff panel, and health thresholds.
In-app "What's new" modal with static changelog data for quick release visibility.
Guidance baked into AO deploy/spawn to clarify required env and module wiring.
Vault import/export messaging and session unlock flow refinements.
Health SLA notification cadence respects failure streaks and averages.
Draft diff overlay performance and empty states tuned.
